item.title: 摩根大通下调私募信贷集团贷款组合估值，《金融时报》报道
item.description: 据《金融时报》周三援引知情人士报道，摩根大通已下调其私募信贷部门持有的部分贷款估值，并正收紧对该领域的贷款业务。【原文：JPMorgan Chase has ​marked down ‌the value of ​certain loans ​held by private-credit ⁠groups ​and is tightening ​its lending to the sector, ​the ​Financial Times reported ‌on ⁠Wednesday, citing people familiar with ​the ​matter.】

item.title: 据《The Information》报道，OpenAI计划在ChatGPT中推出其Sora视频工具。
item.description: 据《信息》周二报道，知情人士透露，OpenAI计划近期在ChatGPT中推出其AI视频生成器Sora。【原文：OpenAI plans to soon launch its AI video generator Sora ​in ChatGPT, The Information reported ‌on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 彭博社报道，中国正采取措施限制银行和政府机构使用OpenClaw人工智能系统
item.description: 彭博社周三援引知情人士消息报道称，中国政府机构及国有企业（包括最大型银行）近日收到通知，因安全原因警告其不得在办公设备上安装OpenClaw软件。【原文：Chinese government agencies ​and state-owned ​enterprises, including the ⁠largest banks, ​have received notices ​in recent days warning them against ​installing OpenClaw ​software on office devices ‌for ⁠security reasons, Bloomberg News reported on ​Wednesday, ​citing ⁠people familiar with the ​matter.】

item.title: 安杜瑞尔将收购太空监视公司ExoAnalytic，旨在增强"黄金穹顶"系统能力
item.description: 安杜瑞尔工业公司周三宣布，已签署最终协议收购ExoAnalytic Solutions公司。这家国家安全企业专注于太空感知与态势感知及导弹防御领域。【原文：Anduril Industries on Wednesday said it has signed a definitive ‌agreement to acquire ExoAnalytic Solutions, a national security company specializing in space sensing and awareness and missile defense.】

item.title: 美国2月消费者价格可能上涨，伊朗冲突前夕
item.description: 美国2月份消费者价格可能有所回升，因中东地区战争升级预期推高汽油价格，而冲突导致油价上涨，预计3月份通胀率将进一步攀升。【原文：U.S. consumer prices likely picked up in February as the cost of gasoline increased in anticipation of an escalating war in the Middle East, and with the ​conflict driving up oil prices, a further rise in inflation is expected in March.】

item.title: 股市持稳，油市震荡加剧，中东战事搅动市场
item.description: 周三股市在油价短暂回落之后趋稳，但由于美以对伊朗战争释放出矛盾信号，投资者难以评估其对全球通胀和经济增长的影响，市场情绪依然紧张。【原文：Shares steadied on Wednesday following a brief retreat in oil prices, but ​markets remained anxious as contradictory signals from the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran left investors struggling to gauge its impact on global inflation and growth.】

item.title: 外汇市场如坐针毡，伊朗战争阴云笼罩市场情绪
item.description: 周三美元汇率持稳，交易员纷纷观望，等待有关美以与伊朗冲突后续动向的信号，而关于冲突解决的矛盾信息令市场情绪持续疲软。【原文：The dollar held its ground on Wednesday as traders moved to the sidelines, awaiting ​cues on what comes next in the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran while mixed messages on a resolution to the conflict ‌kept sentiment frail.】

item.title: 消息人士称，Starboard提名两人加入CarMax董事会
item.description: 知情人士透露，Starboard Value已入股CarMax并提名两名董事加入其董事会，敦促这家二手车零售商提升数字用户体验、削减成本并调整定价结构。【原文：Starboard Value has taken a stake in CarMax and nominated two directors to ​its board, urging the used car retailer to improve the experience ‌of its digital users, cut costs and change its pricing structure, a source familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 知情人士称，软银旗下PayPay计划将美国IPO定价定在区间低端
item.description: 知情人士透露，由于中东战争动荡市场，软银旗下PayPay的首次公开募股定价可能处于发行价区间的低端。【原文：The initial public offering of SoftBank's PayPay ​is likely to price around the low end ‌of its marketing range as war in the Middle East roil markets, said two people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 国际能源署提议从战略储备中释放史上最大规模石油，据《华尔街日报》报道
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周二援引知情人士报道，国际能源署提议释放史上最大规模的石油储备，以压低因美以与伊朗战争而飙升的原油价格。【原文：The International Energy Agency has proposed the largest release of ​oil reserves in its history to bring down ‌crude prices that have soared due to the U.S.-Israel war with Iran, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday, citing officials ​familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 油价下跌，《华尔街日报》称国际能源署提议释放史上最大规模石油储备
item.description: 周三油价下跌，此前《华尔街日报》报道称国际能源署提议释放史上最大规模石油储备，以压低因美以与伊朗战争而飙升的原油价格。【原文：Oil prices dropped on ​Wednesday after the ‌Wall Street Journal reported the International Energy ​Agency has ​proposed the largest release ⁠of oil reserves ​in its history ​to bring down crude prices that have ​soared amid the ​U.S.-Israel war with Iran.】

item.title: 受中东冲突冲击的柴油市场，正威胁全球经济放缓
item.description: 交易员和分析师表示，随着中东战争对工业燃料和最适合生产柴油的原油供应构成压力，柴油价格的飙升正威胁着放缓全球经济活动。【原文：Surging diesel prices are threatening to slow global ​economic activity as the war in the Middle East pressures supplies of both the industrial fuel and the type of crude oil most ‌suited to produce it, traders and analysts said.】

item.title: 美国油价上涨近3美元，中东危机限制供应
item.description: 周三早盘交易中，美国西德克萨斯中质原油价格上涨2.90美元/桶，涨幅达3.5%，至86.33美元/桶。因美国与以色列对伊朗的战争持续，墨西哥湾地区原油供应仍受制约。【原文：U.S. West Texas Intermediate crude oil prices rose by $2.90 per barrel, or 3.5%, to $86.33 in early trade on Wednesday as supplies from the Gulf remain constrained amid the U.S. and Israeli war on Iran.】

item.title: BlackLine与激进股东达成和解，允许战略委员会为出售奠定基础
item.description: BlackLine周二晚间提交的监管文件显示，该公司战略委员会可为潜在的合并或出售交易奠定基础，此举正是该软件制造商部分投资者一直推动的举措。【原文：BlackLine said its strategic committee can lay the groundwork for a potential merger or sale, a move some of the software maker's investors ​have pushed for, according to a regulatory filing made late on Tuesday.】

item.title: 瑞银敦促美国法官限制纳粹相关罪行的赔偿责任
item.description: 瑞银周二敦促美国法官保护其免受新诉讼，这些诉讼源于对前瑞信集团在二战期间活动展开的调查，涉及二战期间纳粹大屠杀相关指控。【原文：UBS urged a U.S. judge on Tuesday to shield it from new Holocaust-related litigation arising from ​an investigation of the former Credit Suisse's activities during World War Two.】

item.title: 据《纽约时报》报道，ChatGPT等人工智能聊天机器人获准在美国参议院正式使用
item.description: 据《纽约时报》周二援引一份备忘录报道，ChatGPT及另外两款人工智能聊天机器人已获准在美国参议院正式使用。【原文：ChatGPT ​and two other artificial ‌intelligence chatbots have been approved for official ​use in ​the U.S. Senate, the New ⁠York Times ​reported on Tuesday, citing ​a memo.】

item.title: 卫星公司延长中东图像延迟服务以防止美国对手利用
item.description: 总部位于加利福尼亚州的行星实验室公司已扩大对中东地区影像数据的访问限制，以防止敌对势力利用这些数据攻击美国及其盟友。此举表明，商业航天业务的扩张可能对冲突产生影响。【原文：California-based Planet Labs has expanded restrictions on accessing ‌its imagery of the Middle East to prevent adversaries from using it to attack the U.S. and its allies, a sign of how the expansion of commercial space business can impact conflicts.】

item.title: 油田服务公司帕特森-UTI表示，油价上涨不会刺激美国增加产量。
item.description: 油田服务公司帕特森-UTI首席执行官安迪·亨德里克斯周二表示，美国与以色列对伊朗开战引发的能源价格飙升，若缺乏确保增加钻探所需的市场可预测性，将不会推动美国石油产量进一步增长。【原文：A surge in energy prices caused by the U.S.-Israel war with Iran will not lead to additional U.S. oil output without ​the market predictability needed to ensure more drilling, Andy Hendricks, ‌CEO of oilfield services company Patterson-UTI, said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 特朗普宣布得克萨斯州炼油厂投产
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周二宣布德克萨斯州布朗斯维尔市一家炼油厂正式投产，并感谢印度能源公司信实集团的投资。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday ‌the opening of an oil refinery in Brownsville, Texas and thanked Indian energy company Reliance for ​its investment.】

item.title: 微软提交法庭之友意见书，支持Anthropic公司对美国国防部的诉讼
item.description: 微软于周二提交了一份拟议简报，支持Anthropic公司提起的诉讼，请求法院暂时阻止美国国防部将这家人工智能初创企业列为供应链风险对象。【原文：Microsoft filed on ​Tuesday a proposed brief ‌in support of Anthropic's lawsuit asking the court to temporarily ​block the U.S. Department ​of Defense's designation of the ⁠AI startup as a ​supply-chain risk.】

item.title: 迪士尼任命迪士尼乐园度假区总裁托马斯·马兹卢姆为主题公园集团主席
item.description: 迪士尼度假区总裁托马斯·马兹卢姆被任命为迪士尼体验业务新任主席，将全面负责公司旗下主题乐园、邮轮、度假酒店及消费品业务。迪士尼公司于周二宣布了这一人事任命。【原文：Disneyland Resort President Thomas Mazloum has been named the next chair of Disney Experiences, overseeing the company's portfolio of theme parks, cruise ships, ​resort hotels and consumer products, the company announced on Tuesday.】

item.title: 加拿大零售商Loblaw公司正就数据泄露事件展开调查
item.description: 加拿大零售商Loblaw周二表示，在发现其IT网络中一个受控的非关键部分存在可疑活动后，正就数据泄露事件展开调查。【原文：Canadian retailer Loblaw said on Tuesday it was investigating a ​data breach after identifying suspicious ‌activity on a contained, non-critical part of its IT network.】

item.title: 交易日 角色互换，华尔街表现落后
item.description: 周二油价暴跌逾10%，创下2022年以来最大单日跌幅，市场寄望中东冲突将趋于缓和。亚洲和欧洲股市大幅上涨，但华尔街表现滞后，美国股市小幅下跌，这是战争爆发以来罕见的情况。【原文：Oil slumped more than 10% on Tuesday, the biggest one-day fall since 2022, on hopes that conflict in the Middle East will de-escalate. Asian and European stocks rose sharply, but in a rare instance since the war broke out, Wall Street lagged and U.S. stocks posted mild losses.】

item.title: 消息人士称，波音公司与以色列签署价值2.89亿美元的合同，将提供5000枚智能炸弹。
item.description: 据路透社周二报道，波音公司已与以色列签署一份价值2.89亿美元的新合同，将交付多达5000枚新型空射精确制导炸弹。【原文：Boeing has signed a new $289 million contract ​with Israel to deliver ​as many as 5,000 new ⁠air-launched smart bombs, a ​source told Reuters on Tuesday.】

item.title: 亚特兰大联储董事会主席：在全国范围内物色博斯蒂克继任者
item.description: 亚特兰大联邦储备银行董事会主席格雷戈里·海尔表示，寻找接替前行长拉斐尔·博斯蒂克的人选将面向全国范围，不限于该行所在的美国东南部地区——前提是候选人愿意且有能力与该地区的企业和民众开展合作。【原文：Atlanta Federal Reserve board Chair Gregory Haile said the search to replace former Atlanta Fed ​President Raphael Bostic would be national in scope, not limited to the bank's southeastern region, as long as candidates ‌seem willing and capable of engaging with people and businesses across the area.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，雪佛龙、壳牌即将敲定美国控制马杜罗后在委内瑞拉的首批大型石油生产协议
item.description: 五位接近谈判的消息人士向路透社透露，国际石油巨头雪佛龙和壳牌正接近达成自今年1月美国逮捕委内瑞拉总统马杜罗以来，与该国的首批大型石油生产协议。【原文：International oil majors Chevron and Shell are closing in on the first big oil production deals with Venezuela since the U.S. capture of President Nicolas Maduro in January, five sources close to the negotiations told Reuters.】

item.title: 甲骨文季度营收超预期，股价上涨
item.description: 甲骨文公司周二公布的第三季度营收超出华尔街预期，人工智能热潮推动其云计算服务需求强劲增长，助力该公司与大型竞争对手抗衡。【原文：Oracle beat Wall Street estimates for third-quarter revenue on Tuesday, ​as robust demand for its cloud computing ‌services, driven by the artificial intelligence boom, helped the company compete against larger rivals.】

item.title: 应用材料与SK海力士携手开发新一代人工智能存储器
item.description: 应用材料公司周二宣布，已与SK海力士达成合作，共同加速开发对人工智能和高性能计算至关重要的先进DRAM及高带宽内存。【原文：Applied Materials ​said ‌on Tuesday it ​has ​partnered with ⁠SK ​Hynix to ​accelerate the development ​of ​advanced DRAM and ‌high-bandwidth ⁠memory crucial for ​artificial ​intelligence ⁠and high-performance ​computing.】

item.title: 拜耳将农药责任多线诉讼战推进至堪萨斯州
item.description: 堪萨斯州议员周二将审议拜耳公司支持的一项法案，该法案将阻止民众因农药制造商未警告其产品可能致癌或引发其他疾病而提起诉讼。与此同时，这家德国公司正准备就除草剂"农达"引发的数千起诉讼达成一项可能超过70亿美元的和解协议。【原文：Kansas lawmakers were set to take up a bill on Tuesday backed by Bayer that would prevent people from ​suing pesticide manufacturers for not warning them that their products could cause cancer or other illnesses, as the German company ‌readies a potential $7 billion-plus settlement for thousands of lawsuits over the weedkiller Roundup.】

item.title: 尼尔森旗下Gracenote公司就OpenAI在人工智能训练中使用元数据一事提起诉讼
item.description: 尼尔森旗下[RIC:RIC:VALCVN.UL]的Gracenote公司于周二在曼哈顿联邦法院起诉OpenAI，指控其未经许可擅自使用该公司用于识别电影、电视节目及其他媒体的元数据来训练人工智能。【原文：Nielsen's [RIC:RIC:VALCVN.UL] Gracenote, which creates metadata that identifies movies, TV programs and other media, sued ​OpenAI in Manhattan federal court on Tuesday, alleging ‌that its work was used without permission to train artificial intelligence.】
